title: Condition Pattern Schema
description: JSON Schema for condition patterns in the Construction Kernel Condition Pattern Library. Each pattern defines a known construction condition with its associated assembly relationships, interface relationships, detail relationships, blocker archetypes, remediation archetypes, issue signatures, and discipline tags. Patterns are kernel truth; runtime may reference but not author patterns.

pattern_id.description: Unique identifier for the condition pattern.

description.description: Human-readable description of the condition and its construction significance.

assembly_relationships.description: Assembly types and roles involved in this condition pattern.

interface_relationships.description: Interface relationships that characterize this condition.

detail_relationships.description: Detail drawings related to this condition pattern.

items.description: Reference to a blocker archetype ID in blocker_archetypes.json.

blocker_archetypes.description: Blocker archetypes commonly triggered by this condition.

items.description: Reference to a remediation archetype ID in remediation_archetypes.json.

remediation_archetypes.description: Remediation archetypes applicable to this condition.

items.description: Reference to an issue signature ID in issue_signatures.json.

issue_signatures.description: Issue signatures that indicate this condition is present.

severity_default.description: Default severity when this condition pattern is detected.

discipline_tags.description: Disciplines responsible for or affected by this condition.
